_comment: Superadmin roster for `pnpm provision-school config/<school>.json --base-url=https://<domain>`. Copy this, fill real facilitators, keep it OUT of git if it holds PII. lat/lng optional (enables geo search); email is only used to address the claim link.

school.name: Academy of Breath
school.heroCopy: Find a certified Academy of Breath facilitator you can trust.
school.brandGuidelines: Warm, grounded, trauma-informed. Avoid medical claims. Emphasise safety, consent, lived experience.

facilitators.headline: Conscious Connected Breathwork for anxiety & burnout
